message:
fix: replace Anthropic logo with console logo in mission sidebar (#5339)

The mission sidebar header, minimized icon, and toggle button were
showing the Anthropic "A" logo via AgentIcon. Replaced all three
with LogoWithStar (the console's globe-with-star logo).

AgentIcon is still used correctly in other contexts (agent selector,
chat messages, settings) where it shows which AI provider is active.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
